products.title: Ceiling Pendant Twisted Soft Round Lampshade
products.description: A modern 3D-printed pendant lampshade with a sleek twisted design that creates a warm, inviting glow. Lightweight (100 g), durable, and perfect for any contemporary space.

products.title: FlowForm Pendant
products.description: Inspired by flowing petals, the Twisted Bloom Pendant Lampshade brings a soft, modern elegance to any space. Precision 3D printed for a unique sculptural look that diffuses light beautifully. Lightweight (220 g), durable, and perfect for homes, cafés, or offices.

products.title: HexaLight Table Lamp
products.description: A modern 3D-printed table lamp featuring a refined geometric texture that casts a warm, cozy glow. Lightweight, durable, and designed to elevate bedrooms, living spaces, and workspaces.
3D printed sculptural lampshade designed for IKEA HEMMA pendant light. Features smooth twisting rib geometry that diffuses light softly while creating a modern, elegant shadow pattern.
products.title: Hemman Lampshade
Curved lampshade with feet stand
products.description: A precision 3D printed curved lampshade with integrated feet stand, engineered for lightweight strength and smooth organic form. Designed for soft ambient lighting, its flowing structure diffuses light evenly while the elevated base ensures stability and a clean modern sculptural look.

products.title: Wave Light Bedside Lamp – Background Light
products.description: A wave-inspired bedside lamp, fully designed and 3D printed for a smooth organic form and lightweight structure. It produces a soft ambient background glow, creating a calm and modern atmosphere while showcasing precision-crafted layered design and sculptural elegance.

products.title: Beehive Pendant – Vase Mode Edition
products.description: A lightweight 3D printed pendant lampshade inspired by natural beehive structures. Designed in vase mode for a smooth, continuous form, it delivers a soft ambient glow while maintaining a minimal and organic aesthetic. Weight: 125g, making it efficient, elegant, and ideal for modern interior lighting.

products.title: The GeoHive Pendant
products.description:
Home Studio Crafted that Art meets tech with precise 3D printing.
Ambient Glow and Geometric pinholes cast a stunning, warm light pattern.
